batchrun.payload: Aragon Divemaster 42 -------------------- Watch Specs Lug Width: 20mm Watch Diameter: 42mm Dial: Sapphire Bezel: Ceramic Current Setup Bracelet: [STAIB 20mm Polished Milanaise Fine Mesh (203094)](https://longislandwatch.com/staib-st-st-2905-20804sbl-mesh-watch-bracelet-st-st-2905-20804sbl/) Status: Purchased & Recommended Research and Alternatives Brand Notes Staib: Widely considered a high-quality brand for mesh bracelets. Crown & Buckle: Noted for good quality NATO straps. Staib SOC 2905: Known as one of their more affordable entries while still being highly recommended. Mesh Bracelet Options Aragon OEM: [20mm Mesh Bracelet](https://www.aragonwatch.com/productp/20smb-bs.htm) Staib 2905: [Polished Mesh](https://longislandwatch.com/staib-st-st-2905-20804sbl-mesh-watch-bracelet-st-st-2905-20804sbl/) Staib 2906: [Good Deal Option](https://longislandwatch.com/staib-st-st-2906-20813sbl-mesh-watch-bracelet-st-st-2906-20813sbl/) Staib 2910: [Thicker Mesh Option](https://longislandwatch.com/staib-st-st-2910-20817sbl-mesh-watch-bracelet-st-st-2910-20817sbl/) (Potential top choice for weight/durability) References Reddit Thread: [Affordable Watches - Mesh Recommendations](https://www.reddit.com/r/Affordablewatches/comments/1pqxpe8/goodmeshbraceletrecomendation/)
